
```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Setup Code Follows:
```{r}
library('tidyverse')
library('tidyr')
library('readr')
library('data.table')
library('purrr')
library('MonteCarlo')
library('mpower')
library('EnvStats')
```

```{r}
dbptox <- read_csv("totaldbp.csv")
qmra <- read_csv('QMRAmodels.csv')
disease_data <- read_csv("finaldiseasedata.csv")
```

```{r}
## Sample Data Generation
# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)
# Define compounds and samples
compounds <- c("Legionella_pneumophila", "Escherichia_coli", "Rotavirus", "Mycobacterium_tuberculosis", "Giardia_duodenalis")
samples <- paste0("DistributionPoint_", 1:50)
# Define compound-specific uniform ranges for concentration (in CFU/L)
ranges <- data.frame(
  compound = compounds,
  mean = c(10, 100, 10, 10, 100),   # realistic lower bounds
  sd = c(2.5, 25, 2.5, 2.5, 25)   # realistic upper bounds
)
# Generate the dataset
data_list <- lapply(compounds, function(comp) {
  range <- ranges[ranges$compound == comp, ]
  data.frame(
    compound = comp,
    sample = samples,
    concentration = rlnorm(length(samples), mean = ranges$mean, sd = ranges$sd)
  )
})
# Combine into one data frame
testpathconc <- do.call(rbind, data_list)

##Chemical

# Set seed for reproducibility
set.seed(123)
# Define compounds and samples
##TBAA and DBAM are our cytotox generated concentrations
compounds <- c("TBAA", "DBAM", "TCM", "NDMA", "TBM")
samples <- paste0("Sample_", 1:50)
# Define compound-specific uniform ranges for concentration (in mg/L)
ranges <- data.frame(
  compound = compounds,
  min = c(1, 1, 1, 0.01, 1),   # realistic lower bounds
  max = c(10, 10, 10, 0.1, 10)   # realistic upper bounds
)
# Generate the dataset
data_list <- lapply(compounds, function(comp) {
  range <- ranges[ranges$compound == comp, ]
  data.frame(
    compound = comp,
    sample = samples,
    concentration = runif(length(samples), min = range$min, max = range$max)
  )
})
# Combine into one data frame
testdbpconc <- do.call(rbind, data_list)

```

```{r}
# Constants for dose calculations
Efreq = 365 #day/year
Eduration = 1 #year
Avgtime = 25550 #day
QLflow = 5.0 * 10^-3 #m^3 / min
Qgflow = 5.0*10^-2 #m^3 / min
BodW = 70 #mg
AT = 25550
AE = 100 #%
CF = 1.67*10^-4 #Conversion factor for cm/hr to m/min

# Mass transfer coefficients (KolA) (m^3/min)
mtchclbr2 <- 4.6*10^-3
mtchcl2br <- 5.9*10^-3
mtchbr3 <- 3.7*10^-3
mtchcl3 <- 7.4*10^-3

KolAvg <- (mtchclbr2 +mtchcl2br + mtchbr3 + mtchcl3)/4

# Chemical Specific dermal permeability constant (cm/hr)
pcchclbr2 <- 2.98*10^-3
pcchcl2br <- 4.02*10^-3
pcchbr3 <- 2.35*10^-3
pcchcl3 <- 7.4*10^-3

PCavg <- (pcchclbr2 + pcchbr3 + pcchcl3 + pcchcl2br)/4

# Henry's Constant values for each DBP @ 298.15K and ideal gas, with 40 degree water
HCFM <- 0.37
HBFM <- 0.061
HBDCM <- 0.197
HDBCM <- 0.108

Henryavg <- (HCFM + HBFM + HBDCM + HDBCM)/4

```


Now data and packages are prepared, let's quickly summarise our inputs. 

```{r}
pathogeninput <- ggplot(testpathconc, aes(x = concentration, fill = compound)) +  geom_histogram(position = "stack", bins = 50) + theme_classic(16) + 
  theme() +
  labs(title = "Input Pathogen Concentrations",
       x = "Concentration (CFU/L)",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "Category") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Spectral")
pathogeninput

cheminput <- ggplot(testdbpconc, aes(x = concentration, fill = compound)) +  geom_histogram(position = "stack", bins = 50) + theme_classic(16)  + 
  theme(text = element_text(family = 'serif'),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(face = 'italic', size = 10),
        legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold', size = 12)) + 
  labs(title = "Input Chemical Concentrations",
       x = "Concentration (mg/L)",
       y = "Count per Bin",
       fill = "Category") + 
  scale_fill_brewer( palette = "Spectral")

cheminput
```
#Monte Carlo Conditions for Exposure
Conditions are generated from standard distributions from the EPA. 

```{r}
# Monte-Carlo
conditions <- function(samp, seedchem = NULL){ 
  if (!is.null(seedchem)) {
    set.seed(seedchem)
  } else {
    warning("No seed provided!", call. = FALSE)
    seedchem <- sample.int(10000, 1)
    set.seed(seedchem)
    message("Random seed = ", seedchem, "\n")
  }

  # Create arrays of different variables based on known distributions
  parameters <- data.frame(
    breath   = runif(samp, min = 0.013, max = 0.017),
    time     = runif(samp, min = 5, max = 25),
    enrich   = rtri(samp, min = 100, max = 10000, mode = 1000),
    volume   = runif(samp, min = 2, max = 18),
    volumenorm <- rnorm(10000, 10, 4),
    ingestion = runif(samp, min = 1e-3, max = 3e-3),
    SA       = runif(samp, min = 1.53, max = 1.94)
  )

  ## Monte Carlo droplet dispersion (cvd)
  cvd_storage <- numeric(samp)

  for (s in seq_len(samp)) {
    cvd <- 0
    for (i in 1:10) {
      if (i == 1) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 17.5, 0.3) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.23, 0.25))
      } else if (i == 2) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 17.5, 0.17) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.4, 0.53))
      } else if (i == 3) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 19.4, 0.35) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.36, 0.62))
      } else if (i == 4) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 19.4, 0.35) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.29, 0.61))
      } else if (i == 5) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 19.4, 0.35) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.19, 0.52))
      } else if (i == 6) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 19.4, 0.35) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.10, 0.4))
      } else if (i == 7) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 20.0, 0.31) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.06, 0.29))
      } else if (i == 8) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 20.0, 0.31) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.03, 0.19))
      } else if (i == 9) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 20.0, 0.31) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.01, 0.12))
      } else if (i == 10) {
        cvd <- cvd + (rlnorm(1, 17.5, 0.3) * ((pi/6)*((i*10^-6)^3)) * runif(1, 0.01, 0.06))
      }
    }
    cvd_storage[s] <- cvd
  }

  # Add cvd into the final dataset
  parameters$cvd <- cvd_storage

  return(parameters)
}

# Example run
conds <- conditions(10000, 123)
head(conds)


```

##Dose Calculations

Following are the dose functions for the DBP model. 
``` {r}
# Dose calculation function 
calculate_airconc <- function(concentration, condition) { 
  Vs <- condition$volume 
  Cw <- concentration 
  t <- condition$time 
  N = (KolAvg)/ QLflow 
  a = (QLflow *Cw *(1-exp(-N)))/Vs 
  b = (((QLflow/Henryavg) *(1-exp(-N)))+Qgflow)/Vs 
  Cst = (1-exp(-b * t))* (a/b) 
  Cair <- (Cst)/2 
  return(Cair) }

calculate_airconc_SA <- function(concentration, condition) { 
  ##SENSANA
  VsSA <- condition$volume 
  CwSA <- concentration 
  tSA <- condition$time 
  NSA = (KolAvg)/ QLflow 
  aSA = (QLflow *Cw *(1-exp(-N)))/Vs 
  bSA = (((QLflow/Henryavg) *(1-exp(-N)))+Qgflow)/Vs 
  CstSA = (1-exp(-b * t))* (a/b) 
  CairSA <- (Cst)/2 
  return(CairSA) } 


calculate_dose_chem <- function(chemconc, bioconc, mc, airconcentration) { 
  #Reading in concentration data 
  Cwbio <- bioconc 
  Cwchem <- chemconc 
  # Cwmetal <- metalconc 
  #Interpreting MC data 
  SurfArea <- mc$SA 
  IR <- mc$ingestion 
  Exposuretime <- mc$time 
  ## Chemical dose 
  # Inhalation 
  EC = (airconcentration * Exposuretime *Efreq *Eduration)/AT 
  # Dermal
  DCDI = (Cwchem * SurfArea * PCavg * Avgtime * Efreq *Eduration * CF) / (BodW * AT) 
  # Ingestion (Bact) 
  OCDI = (Cwchem * IR * Efreq * Eduration)/(BodW *AT) 
  
  
  ##Biological Dose 
  #Inhalation 
  cbac = Cwbio 
  breath = mc$breath 
  enrich = mc$enrich 
  time = mc$time 
  cvd = mc$cvd 
  ECB <- cbac * breath * time * enrich * cvd 
  
  return(list("InhaledChem" = EC, "DermalChem" = DCDI, "OralChem" = OCDI, "InhaledBio" = ECB)) }
```



```{r}
dosefunc <- function(datachem, databio, conditions, summary_probs = c(0.05, 0.5, 0.95)) {
  n_conditions <- nrow(conditions)
  conditions_list <- split(conditions, seq_len(n_conditions))
  conditions_list <- lapply(conditions_list, as.list)
  
  results_list <- list()
  
  # Loop through samples
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(datachem))) {
    current_sample <- datachem[i, ]
    sample <- current_sample$sample
    chemical <- current_sample$compound
    chemconc <- as.numeric(current_sample$concentration)
    
    if (is.na(chemconc) || is.na(sample) || is.na(chemical)) next
    
    # Grab corresponding biological data
    bioconc   <- as.numeric(databio$concentration[i])
    
    # Calculate air concentrations for all conditions
    air_concs <- vapply(conditions_list, function(row) {
      calculate_airconc(chemconc, row) 
    }, numeric(1))
    
    # Calculate doses across conditions
    dose_matrix <- lapply(seq_along(air_concs), function(j) {
      calculate_dose_chem(chemconc, bioconc, conditions_list[[j]], air_concs[j])
    })
    
    # Extract dose vectors
    inhaledChem <- unlist(lapply(dose_matrix, `[[`, "InhaledChem"))
    dermalChem  <- unlist(lapply(dose_matrix, `[[`, "DermalChem"))
    oralChem    <- unlist(lapply(dose_matrix, `[[`, "OralChem"))
    
    
    inhaledBio <- unlist(lapply(dose_matrix, `[[`, "InhaledBio"))
    
    # Combine into a long format tibble
    results_list[[i]] <- bind_rows(
      tibble(
        sample = sample,
        compound = chemical,
        type = "chemical",
        route = "inhaled",
        dose = inhaledChem
      ),
      tibble(
        sample = sample,
        compound = chemical,
        type = "chemical",
        route = "dermal",
        dose = dermalChem
      ),
      tibble(
        sample = sample,
        compound = chemical,
        type = "chemical",
        route = "oral",
        dose = oralChem
      ),
   
      tibble(
        sample = sample,
        compound = databio$compound[i],
        type = "pathogen",
        route = "inhaled",
        dose = inhaledBio
      )
    )
  }
  #Return results
  results_df <- bind_rows(results_list) %>%
    group_by(sample, compound, type, route)
  
  return(results_df)
}

```

Run Dose Calculations
```{r}
# Run the Above
dose_results <- dosefunc(testdbpconc, testpathconc, conds)

```



```{r}
colnames(dbptox)[1] <- "compound"
dose <- left_join(dose_results, dbptox, by = 'compound')


inhchemprob <- dose %>%
  filter(type == 'chemical') %>%
  filter(route == 'inhaled') %>%
  mutate(chemriskinhaled = dose * IUR *365)#Lifetime cancer risk single dose
  
oralchemprob <- dose %>%
  filter(type == 'chemical') %>%
  filter(route == 'oral') %>%  
  mutate(chemriskoral = dose * OSF*365) 

chemprob <- data.frame(oralchemprob, inhchemprob)

```



```{r}
## Exponential distribution annual risk
doseresponseexp <- function(k, d){
  infdaily1 <- 1 - exp(-k*d)
  AnnInf <- 1 - (1 - infdaily1)^365
  return(AnnInf)
}

## Beta-Poisson Distribution annual risk
doseresponsebp <- function(a, n50, d){
  infdaily2 <- 1 - ((1 + d*((2^(1/a)-1)/n50))^-a)
  AnnInf <- 1 - (1 - infdaily2)^365
  return(AnnInf)
}

## Apply QMRA models to dose vector
conctoprobbacteria <- function(dosentoxdata){
  # Preallocate result vector
  results <- numeric(nrow(dosentoxdata))
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(dosentoxdata))) {
    dose <- dosentoxdata$dose[j]
    model <- dosentoxdata$ModelType[j]
    
    if (is.na(dosentoxdata$ModelType[j])) {
      results[j] <- NA
    } else if (dosentoxdata$ModelType[j] == "bp") {
      a <- dosentoxdata$a[j]
      N50 <- dosentoxdata$N50[j]
      results[j] <- doseresponsebp(a, N50, dose)
    } else if (dosentoxdata$ModelType[j] == "exp") {
      k <- dosentoxdata$k[j]
      results[j] <- doseresponseexp(k, dose)
    } else {
      results[j] <- NA
    }
  }
  
  # Return as a dataframe with same number of rows
  dosentoxdata$AnnualRisk <- results
  return(dosentoxdata)
}

conctoprobbacteriaSA <- function(dosentoxdata){
  # Preallocate result vector
  resultsSA <- numeric(nrow(dosentoxdata))
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(dosentoxdata))) {
    dose <- dosentoxdata$dose[j]
    k <- dosentoxdata$ModelType[j]
    resultsSA[j] <- doseresponseexp(k, dose)
  }
  
  # Return as a dataframe with same number of rows
  dosentoxdata$AnnualRiskSA <- resultsSA
  return(dosentoxdata)
}
```


```{r}
# Get all data into one set
dosepathogen <- dose_results %>%
  filter(type == 'pathogen') 

colnames(qmra)[1] <- 'compound'
dosepathogen <- left_join(dosepathogen, qmra, by = 'compound')


probs <- conctoprobbacteria(dosepathogen)

```



```{r}

# Initialize disease_params list
disease_params <- list()
setnum <- 10000

for (i in 1:nrow(disease_data)) {
  disease_name <- make.names(disease_data[[i, 1]])

  # Sample duration
  duration <- if (!is.na(disease_data$durlow[i])) {
    if (grepl("normal", tolower(disease_data$durtype[i]))) {
      rnorm(setnum, mean = disease_data$durlow[i], sd = disease_data$dursd[i])
    } else {
      runif(setnum, min = disease_data$durlow[i], max = disease_data$durhigh[i])
    }
  } else { NA }

  # Sample severity
  severity <- if (!is.na(disease_data$dwlow[i])) {
    if (grepl("normal", tolower(disease_data$dwtype[i]))) {
      rnorm(setnum, mean = disease_data$dwlow[i], sd = disease_data$dwsd[i])
    } else {
      runif(setnum, min = disease_data$dwlow[i], max = disease_data$dwup[i])
    }
  } else { NA }

  # Build parameter list
  disease_params[[disease_name]] <- list(
    lostlife = disease_data$`Reduction_in_Life_Expectancy`[i],
    mort = disease_data$`Mortality_Rate`[i],
    duration = duration,
    severity = severity
  )
}
```


```{r}

set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
popservicearea <- 10000
daly_results_bio <- numeric(nrow(probs))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(probs))) {
  disease <- probs$compound[i]
  prob <- probs$AnnualRisk[i]
  params <- disease_params[[disease]]

  if (is.null(params)) {
    warning(paste("No parameters found for disease:", disease))
    next
  }

  # Randomly sample one value from duration and severity
  duration <- sample(params$duration, 1)
  severity <- sample(params$severity, 1)

  YLL <- prob * params$lostlife * popservicearea * params$mort
  prevalence <- prob * popservicearea * duration
  YLD <- prevalence * severity

  daly_results_bio[i] <- YLL + YLD
}

# Add to your data frame
probs$DALY <- daly_results_bio

```

```{r}
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
popservicearea <- 10000
daly_results_oc <- numeric(nrow(oralchemprob))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(oralchemprob))) {
  disease <- oralchemprob$compound[i]
  prob <- oralchemprob$chemriskoral[i]
  params <- disease_params[["Bladder_Cancer"]]

  if (is.null(params)) {
    warning(paste("No parameters found for disease:", disease))
    next
  }

  # Randomly sample one value from duration and severity
  duration <- sample(params$duration, 1)
  severity <- sample(params$severity, 1)

  YLL <- prob * params$lostlife * popservicearea * params$mort
  prevalence <- prob * popservicearea * duration
  YLD <- prevalence * severity

  daly_results_oc[i] <- YLL + YLD
}

# Add to your data frame
oralchemprob$DALY <- daly_results_oc
```


```{r}
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
popservicearea <- 10000
daly_results_ic <- numeric(nrow(inhchemprob))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(inhchemprob))) {
  disease <- inhchemprob$compound[i]
  prob <- inhchemprob$chemriskinhaled[i]
  params <- disease_params[["Bladder_Cancer"]]

  if (is.null(params)) {
    warning(paste("No parameters found for disease:", disease))
    next
  }

  # Randomly sample one value from duration and severity
  duration <- sample(params$duration, 1)
  severity <- sample(params$severity, 1)

  YLL <- prob * params$lostlife * popservicearea * params$mort
  prevalence <- prob * popservicearea * duration
  YLD <- prevalence * severity

  daly_results_ic[i] <- YLL + YLD
}

# Add to your data frame
inhchemprob$DALY <- daly_results_ic
```



```{r}
##Summaries for Viz

full_frame <- data.frame(probs, chemprob)
# Combine all DALY vectors into a single data frame
daly_df <- data.frame(
  sampleno = full_frame$sample,
  totaldaly = probs$DALY + inhchemprob$DALY + oralchemprob$DALY,
  Pathogens = probs$DALY,
  Chemicals = inhchemprob$DALY +  oralchemprob$DALY
)


# Convert to long format for ggplot
daly_long <- daly_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Pathogens, Chemicals),
               names_to = "DALY_type",
               values_to = "DALY_value")

combinedchemicalrisk <- inhchemprob$DALY + oralchemprob$DALY

chemprob$totalrisk <- combinedchemicalrisk

conservativedbprisk <- chemprob %>%
  filter(compound %in% c("NDMA", "TCM"))



```


```{r}
pathogeneffect <- ggplot(probs, aes(x = DALY, fill = compound)) +   geom_histogram(position = "stack", bins = 100) +
  labs(title = "Disability Adjusted Life Years Lost to Drinking Water Contaminants",
       x = "DALYs Lost Due To Contaminant",
       y = "Monte Carlo Iterations",
       fill = "Category") +
  theme_minimal()
pathogeneffect

chemeffect <- ggplot(chemprob, aes(x = totalrisk, fill = compound)) +   geom_histogram(position = "stack", bins = 50) +
  labs(title = "Disability Adjusted Life Years Lost to Drinking Water Contaminants",
       x = "DALYs Lost Due To Contaminant",
       y = "Monte Carlo Iterations",
       fill = "Category") +
  theme_minimal() 

chemeffect

chemeffectcon <- ggplot(conservativedbprisk, aes(x = totalrisk, fill = compound)) +   geom_histogram(position = "stack", bins = 50) +
  labs(title = "Conservative DALYs lost to Drinking Water Contaminants",
       x = "DALYs Lost Due To Contaminant",
       y = "Monte Carlo Iterations",
       fill = "Category") +
  theme_minimal() 
chemeffectcon
```


```{r}

dalychembiograph <- daly_long %>%
  filter(DALY_type == "Pathogens" | DALY_type == "Chemicals")
chembio <-ggplot(dalychembiograph, aes(x = DALY_value, fill = DALY_type)) +
  geom_histogram(position = "stack", bins = 50) +
  labs(title = "Disability Adjusted Life Years Lost to Drinking Water Contaminants",
       x = "DALYs Lost Due To Contaminant",
       y = "Monte Carlo Iterations",
       fill = "Category") +
  theme_minimal() + xlim(-100, 3000) + ylim(0, 4e05)

chembio

```





```{r}
#Test on sample 1

meandata <- daly_df %>%
  mutate(avg = select(., DistributionPoint1:DistributionPoint9)) %>%
  pmap(~ mean(c(...)))

```


```{r}

##Spearman correlation, Conditions
conds_big <- bind_rows(replicate(5, conds, simplify = FALSE))
cor.test(conds_big$breath, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(conds_big$time, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(conds_big$enrich, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(conds_big$volume, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(conds_big$ingestion, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(conds_big$SA, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(conds_big$cvd, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')



#Spearman Correlation, Inputs
legionellainputs <- testpathconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'Legionella_pneumophila')

giardiainputs <- testpathconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'Giardia_duodenalis')

ecinputs <- testpathconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'Escherichia_coli')

noroinputs <- testpathconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'Rotavirus')

mtinputs <- testpathconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'Mycobacterium_tuberculosis')

tbminputs <- testdbpconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'TBM')

tcminputs <- testdbpconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'TCM')

tbaainputs <- testdbpconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'TBAA')

NDMAinputs <- testdbpconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'NDMA')

DBAMinputs <- testdbpconc %>%
  filter(compound == 'DBAM')

input_big_leg <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, legionellainputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_gia <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, giardiainputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_ec <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, ecinputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_noro <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, noroinputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_mt <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, mtinputs, simplify = FALSE))

input_big_tbaa <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, tbaainputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_tcm <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, tcminputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_tbm <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, tbminputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_ndma <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, NDMAinputs, simplify = FALSE))
input_big_dbam <- bind_rows(replicate(1000, DBAMinputs, simplify = FALSE))


#Input Correlation Tests
cor.test(input_big_leg$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_gia$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_ec$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_noro$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_mt$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(input_big_tbaa$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_tcm$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_tbm$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_ndma$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(input_big_dbam$concentration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')



```



```{r}
##Disease traits
big_giardia <- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Giardia_duodenalis, simplify = FALSE))
big_leg<- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Legionella_pneumophila, simplify = FALSE))
big_ec<- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Escherichia_coli, simplify = FALSE))
big_norovirus<- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Norovirus, simplify = FALSE))
big_mt<- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Mycobacterium_tuberculosis, simplify = FALSE))

big_bladder<- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Giardia_duodenalis, simplify = FALSE))
big_liver<- bind_rows(replicate(5, disease_params$Giardia_duodenalis, simplify = FALSE))

cor.test(big_giardia$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_giardia$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(big_leg$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_leg$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(big_ec$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_ec$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(big_norovirus$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_norovirus$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(big_mt$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_mt$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(big_bladder$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_bladder$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')

cor.test(big_liver$severity, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
cor.test(big_liver$duration, sample1data$totaldaly, method = 'spearman')
```
